description: Read/write Standard Catalog volume files, browse catalog metadata, and trigger KB ingestion. File IO + catalog browsing delegate to the shared aidp_io URI contract.

tools.description: Pull a specific file from a Standard Catalog volume, or list a volume's files. Either set source_uri (master:cat.sch.vol:/path or workspace:/path) OR provide volume_key + path / catalog/schema/volume names + path. Use to load a known reference document an agent needs.

schema.name: operation
schema.description: 'get' (default) to read a file, or 'list' to list a volume/folder.

schema.name: source_uri
schema.description: AIDP URI to read from. Format: master:<catalog>.<schema>.<volume>:/<path> or workspace:/<path>. When set, supersedes volume_key/catalog/schema/volume/path.

schema.name: path
schema.description: File path within the volume for get (e.g. /safety_manual.md), or folder path for list (default /). Ignored when source_uri is set.

schema.name: volume_key
schema.description: The volume key, if known. Otherwise provide catalog/schema/volume.

schema.name: catalog
schema.description: Catalog name (or key) when resolving by name.

schema.name: schema
schema.description: Schema name (or key) when resolving by name.

schema.name: volume
schema.description: Volume name (or key) when resolving by name.

_confDescriptions.region: OCI region. Auto-filled from aidp-deploy.config.json. (e.g. us-ashburn-1)
_confDescriptions.data_lake_ocid: AIDP Data Lake OCID. Auto-filled from aidp-deploy.config.json. AIDP Console -> top-right -> Workspace info.
_confDescriptions.catalog: Standard catalog NAME. AIDP Console -> Catalogs -> Standard catalogs. Leave blank if using volume_key.
_confDescriptions.schema: Schema NAME within the catalog. AIDP Console -> Catalogs -> <catalog> -> Schemas. Leave blank if using volume_key.
_confDescriptions.volume: Volume NAME within the schema. AIDP Console -> Catalogs -> <catalog> -> <schema> -> Volumes. Leave blank if using volume_key.
_confDescriptions.volume_key: Volume UUID. AIDP Console -> Volumes -> click -> URL contains the key. Alternative to catalog/schema/volume names.
_confDescriptions.max_bytes: Cap on response/file bytes; returns truncated:true when hit.
_confDescriptions.auth_mode: Auth flavor: resource_principal (default, on-cluster), user_principal, or instance_principal.
_confDescriptions.fingerprint: OCI API key fingerprint. Auto-filled from ~/.oci/config.
_confDescriptions.private_key_content: (secret) PEM private key — DO NOT commit. Provide via secret store at deploy time.
_confDescriptions.pass_phrase: (secret) Private key passphrase — DO NOT commit.
_confDescriptions.service_path: Auto-derived from api_version (20240831->dataLakes, 20260430->aiDataPlatforms). Only set if AIDP exposes a custom path.

_schemaDescriptions.source_uri: AIDP URI form: master:<catalog>.<schema>.<volume>:/<path> for catalog volumes, or workspace:/<path> for workspace files. When set, takes precedence over the legacy fields below. Delegated to the shared aidp_io module.

tools.description: Write a file into a Standard Catalog volume. Either set dest_uri (master:cat.sch.vol:/path) OR provide volume_key + path + content / catalog/schema/volume names. Use to persist an agent's output (report, dataset, summary) back into the catalog. Workspace writes go through Workspace File.

schema.name: dest_uri
schema.description: AIDP master URI to write to. Format: master:<catalog>.<schema>.<volume>:/<path>. When set, supersedes volume_key/catalog/schema/volume/path. Workspace writes go through Workspace File.

schema.name: path
schema.description: Destination file path within the volume (e.g. /reports/summary.md). Ignored when dest_uri is set.

schema.name: content
schema.description: The file content to write.

schema.name: volume_key
schema.description: The volume key, if known. Otherwise provide catalog/schema/volume.

schema.name: catalog
schema.description: Catalog name (or key) when resolving by name.

schema.name: schema
schema.description: Schema name (or key) when resolving by name.

schema.name: volume
schema.description: Volume name (or key) when resolving by name.

_confDescriptions.region: OCI region. Auto-filled from aidp-deploy.config.json. (e.g. us-ashburn-1)
_confDescriptions.data_lake_ocid: AIDP Data Lake OCID. Auto-filled from aidp-deploy.config.json. AIDP Console -> top-right -> Workspace info.
_confDescriptions.catalog: Standard catalog NAME. AIDP Console -> Catalogs -> Standard catalogs. Leave blank if using volume_key.
_confDescriptions.schema: Schema NAME within the catalog. AIDP Console -> Catalogs -> <catalog> -> Schemas. Leave blank if using volume_key.
_confDescriptions.volume: Volume NAME within the schema. AIDP Console -> Catalogs -> <catalog> -> <schema> -> Volumes. Leave blank if using volume_key.
_confDescriptions.volume_key: Volume UUID. AIDP Console -> Volumes -> click -> URL contains the key. Alternative to catalog/schema/volume names.
_confDescriptions.auth_mode: Auth flavor: resource_principal (default, on-cluster), user_principal, or instance_principal.
_confDescriptions.fingerprint: OCI API key fingerprint. Auto-filled from ~/.oci/config.
_confDescriptions.private_key_content: (secret) PEM private key — DO NOT commit. Provide via secret store at deploy time.
_confDescriptions.pass_phrase: (secret) Private key passphrase — DO NOT commit.
_confDescriptions.service_path: Auto-derived from api_version (20240831->dataLakes, 20260430->aiDataPlatforms). Only set if AIDP exposes a custom path.

_schemaDescriptions.dest_uri: AIDP master URI form: master:<catalog>.<schema>.<volume>:/<path>. When set, supersedes the legacy volume_key / catalog / schema / volume / path fields. Workspace writes are not supported here — use the Workspace File tool. Delegated to the shared aidp_io module.

tools.description: Browse catalog metadata: list catalogs, schemas, tables, volumes, or knowledge bases, or describe a table's columns. Use so an agent can discover the right data asset before acting on it. Delegates to aidp_io when its browsing helpers are available.

schema.name: list
schema.description: What to list: catalogs, schemas, tables, volumes, knowledgeBases, or 'table' to describe one.

schema.name: catalog_key
schema.description: Catalog key (required for schemas/tables/volumes/KBs).

schema.name: schema_key
schema.description: Schema key (required for tables/volumes/KBs).

schema.name: table_key
schema.description: Table key (required when list='table').

_confDescriptions.region: OCI region. Auto-filled from aidp-deploy.config.json. (e.g. us-ashburn-1)
_confDescriptions.data_lake_ocid: AIDP Data Lake OCID. Auto-filled from aidp-deploy.config.json. AIDP Console -> top-right -> Workspace info.
_confDescriptions.auth_mode: Auth flavor: resource_principal (default, on-cluster), user_principal, or instance_principal.
_confDescriptions.fingerprint: OCI API key fingerprint. Auto-filled from ~/.oci/config.
_confDescriptions.private_key_content: (secret) PEM private key — DO NOT commit. Provide via secret store at deploy time.
_confDescriptions.pass_phrase: (secret) Private key passphrase — DO NOT commit.
_confDescriptions.service_path: Auto-derived from api_version (20240831->dataLakes, 20260430->aiDataPlatforms). Only set if AIDP exposes a custom path.

tools.description: List a knowledge base's ingestion jobs, or trigger an ingestion run to (re)index it. Use after documents change so the KB is up to date for RAG queries. Delegates to aidp_io.list_kb_jobs / trigger_kb_job_run when present.

schema.name: operation
schema.description: 'list_jobs' (default) to see jobs, or 'trigger' to start a run.

schema.name: kb_key
schema.description: Knowledge base key (e.g. catalog.schema.kbName).

schema.name: job_key
schema.description: Job key to trigger (required for operation=trigger; find it via list_jobs).

schema.name: run_config
schema.description: Optional run config body for operation=trigger (passed through as JSON).

_confDescriptions.region: OCI region. Auto-filled from aidp-deploy.config.json. (e.g. us-ashburn-1)
_confDescriptions.data_lake_ocid: AIDP Data Lake OCID. Auto-filled from aidp-deploy.config.json. AIDP Console -> top-right -> Workspace info.
_confDescriptions.kb_key: Knowledge Base key (catalog.schema.kbName). AIDP Console -> Knowledge Bases -> URL.
_confDescriptions.auth_mode: Auth flavor: resource_principal (default, on-cluster), user_principal, or instance_principal.
_confDescriptions.fingerprint: OCI API key fingerprint. Auto-filled from ~/.oci/config.
_confDescriptions.private_key_content: (secret) PEM private key — DO NOT commit. Provide via secret store at deploy time.
_confDescriptions.pass_phrase: (secret) Private key passphrase — DO NOT commit.
_confDescriptions.service_path: Auto-derived from api_version (20240831->dataLakes, 20260430->aiDataPlatforms). Only set if AIDP exposes a custom path.

tools.description: Read or list files in the workspace (not a catalog volume). Workspace files (notebooks, scripts, text) live under /Workspace. Either set source_uri / dest_uri (workspace:/<path>) OR provide a path and rely on the configured workspace_id. Use for an agent's code/config files; for Standard Catalog volume files use Catalog File Read / Catalog Volume Write.

schema.name: operation
schema.description: 'get' (default) to read a file, or 'list' to list a folder.

schema.name: source_uri
schema.description: Workspace URI to read from. Format: workspace:/<path>. Master URIs are not accepted here — use Catalog File Read.

schema.name: dest_uri
schema.description: Workspace URI to write to (reserved for future write operations). Format: workspace:/<path>. Master URIs are not accepted here — use Catalog Volume Write.

schema.name: path
schema.description: Workspace path relative to /Workspace, e.g. Notebooks/foo.ipynb (for get) or a folder for list (default /). Ignored when source_uri/dest_uri is set.

_confDescriptions.region: OCI region. Auto-filled from aidp-deploy.config.json. (e.g. us-ashburn-1)
_confDescriptions.data_lake_ocid: AIDP Data Lake OCID. Auto-filled from aidp-deploy.config.json. AIDP Console -> top-right -> Workspace info.
_confDescriptions.workspace_id: AIDP Workspace UUID. Auto-filled from aidp-deploy.config.json.
_confDescriptions.max_bytes: Cap on response/file bytes; returns truncated:true when hit.
_confDescriptions.auth_mode: Auth flavor: resource_principal (default, on-cluster), user_principal, or instance_principal.
_confDescriptions.fingerprint: OCI API key fingerprint. Auto-filled from ~/.oci/config.
_confDescriptions.private_key_content: (secret) PEM private key — DO NOT commit. Provide via secret store at deploy time.
_confDescriptions.pass_phrase: (secret) Private key passphrase — DO NOT commit.
_confDescriptions.service_path: Auto-derived from api_version (20240831->dataLakes, 20260430->aiDataPlatforms). Only set if AIDP exposes a custom path.

_schemaDescriptions.source_uri: AIDP workspace URI form: workspace:/<path>. When set, supersedes the legacy path field. Delegated to the shared aidp_io module.
_schemaDescriptions.dest_uri: AIDP workspace URI form: workspace:/<path>. Reserved for future workspace-write operations through this tool. Delegated to the shared aidp_io module.
